title: Synth_xilinx generates too many DSPs for simple multiplication
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.45+106

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

The following code (generated bu ghdl) gets synthesized into 3 DSPs where only 1 DSP48E1 is required.

```verilog
module zybo_top
  (input  [24:0] inA,
   input  [17:0] inB,
   output [31:0] res);
  wire [42:0] n1_o;
  wire [42:0] n2_o;
  wire [42:0] n3_o;
  wire [31:0] n4_o;
  assign res = n4_o;
  /* zybo_top.vhd:19:52  */
  assign n1_o = {{18{inA[24]}}, inA}; // sext
  /* zybo_top.vhd:19:52  */
  assign n2_o = {{25{inB[17]}}, inB}; // sext
  /* zybo_top.vhd:19:52  */
  assign n3_o = n1_o * n2_o; // smul
  /* zybo_top.vhd:19:33  */
  assign n4_o = n3_o[31:0];  // trunc
endmodule
```

Result :
```
Number of cells:                 78
     DSP48E1                         3
     IBUF                           43
     OBUF                           32
```

Command line :
`yosys -l yosys.log -p "scratchpad -set abc9.D 5000 ; synth_xilinx -arch xc7 -top zybo_top ; write_json zybo_top.json" zybo_top.v`

Complete archive at following public link :
https://cloud.univ-grenoble-alpes.fr/s/7LJNLkjkfPPdKkX

Full version :
` Yosys 0.45+106 (git sha1 982fade0d, g++ 14.2.1 -march=x86-64 -mtune=generic -O2 -fno-plt -fexceptions -fstack-clash-protection -fcf-protection -fno-omit-frame-pointer -mno-omit-leaf-frame-pointer -ffile-prefix-map=/home/prostboa/Dev/AUR/yosys-git/src=/usr/src/debug/yosys-git -flto=auto -fPIC -O3)`


### Expected Behavior

The result should be 1 DSP48E1 block

### Actual Behavior

We obtain 3 DSP48E1 blocks
